title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint to v4.12.0
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [eslint](https://github.com/eslint/eslint) from `v4.11.0` to `v4.12.0`

<details>

-   [`28c9c8e`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/28c9c8e7022be6da90b424ae4cf534f743ef0f32) New: add a Linter#defineParser function (#​9321)

-   [`208fb0f`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/208fb0f3f8a42236e7324f9119d5791555fdb6f0) Fix: Use XML 1.1 on XML formatters (fixes #​9607) (#​9608)
-   [`6e04f14`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/6e04f140bcbe3382f1943ca657948ed5f5dd9948) Upgrade: `globals` to 11.0.1 (fixes #​9614) (#​9632)
-   [`e13d439`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/e13d439fe2f03e3fe2b7950599c0ff78b20739d0) Fix: space-in-parens crash (#​9655)
-   [`92171cc`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/92171ccc8f06cd26aa75c9510af3c1605629c7b2) Docs: Updating migration guide for single-line disable (#​9385)
-   [`f39ffe7`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/f39ffe713dc355b6a2db1ee73a01a7267bea18e8) Docs: remove extra punctuation from readme (#​9640)
-   [`a015234`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/a015234daa4497bfdbacaf28e5ec34c4a15c91eb) Fix: prefer-destructuring false positive on "super" (fixes #​9625) (#​9626)
-   [`0cf081e`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/0cf081ef7249c8e3b9e2cba4710f6205ef996b02) Update: add importNames option to no-restricted-imports (#​9506)
-   [`332c214`](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/commit/332c21451a705c22463c12c04eaa7b134a7acf36) Docs: Add @​platinumazure to TSC (#​9618)
